notes: Sool Sool Ice Cream is a 25-person artisan ice cream brand targeting New York and the US market with online sales. Three key governance scenarios: (1) ice cream cup procurement ($1,800, 1000 units — triggers R1 Operations Manager approval, procurement risk because 700/800 storage units are used); (2) new flavor R&D — triggers R4 R&D Lead review, strategic goal G2; (3) production staff hiring — triggers R5 sequential Finance Manager + CEO approval. External signals should emphasize US market ice cream demand trends, SNS-driven demand forecast accuracy (over-order risk), post-promotional softening, US cold storage / supply chain operational benchmarks, and New York small business hiring guidance. Financial risk threshold is $1,500.
